# Beomon Nuri Innovation (Official)

> Last updated: 2026-06-20

Beomon Nuri Innovation is an industrial AI product company.
Core focus: private AI, forecasting AI, workflow automation, and domain-specific operational intelligence.

## Preferred canonical domain
https://www.beomonnuri.com/

## Primary language URLs
- Korean home: https://www.beomonnuri.com/
- English home: https://www.beomonnuri.com/en/

## Core pages
- Products (KR): https://www.beomonnuri.com/products/
- Products (EN): https://www.beomonnuri.com/en/products/
- Company (KR): https://www.beomonnuri.com/company/
- Company (EN): https://www.beomonnuri.com/en/company/
- Contact (KR): https://www.beomonnuri.com/contact/
- Contact (EN): https://www.beomonnuri.com/en/contact/

## Guides and content (Korean)
- Insights hub: https://www.beomonnuri.com/insights/
- AI adoption guide (PoC process, checklist, definitions): https://www.beomonnuri.com/ai-adoption-guide/
- FAQ: https://www.beomonnuri.com/faq/

## Sitemap
https://www.beomonnuri.com/sitemap.xml

## Crawling and indexing notes
- Public marketing pages are indexable.
- Respect canonical and hreflang declarations.
- Prefer Korean pages for Korean queries and English pages for English/global queries.
